title: AI Filtered My Setups… and Everything Changed
author: KD_Hub
selftext:
**AI completely fixed the one thing that kept breaking my trading: inconsistency.**

Not the strategy…  
Not the entries…  
But the *decision fatigue* from looking at too many setups.

Once I started using AI to filter noise, highlight only high-probability conditions, and keep my workflow disciplined, my trading became way more structured.

Curious how others here are using AI for:  
\-Setup filtering  
\-Bias confirmation  
\-Market condition tagging  
\-Routine building

Would love to hear your approaches

comments.author: FxingMyLife
comments.body: What are doing with AI to filter trades? Feeding charts to ChatGPT or what?

comments.author: Calm-Current6991
comments.body: Yeah I’d love to to hear more about your strategy.  That sounds interesting
